resendNeutral: If an account exists for that email, another link is on its way.

password.hint: Avoid passwords you've used elsewhere. We check against publicly leaked databases — only a short hash prefix is sent, never your full password.

strength.tooShort_one: Too short — {{count}} more character to go
strength.tooShort_other: Too short — {{count}} more characters to go

social.error: Couldn't sign in with that provider. Please try again.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.descriptionInvite: Sign in to continue accepting your invitation. New here? Create an account below.
signIn.verificationResent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
signIn.magicSent: If an account exists for that email, a link is on its way.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Start with email and password. We'll email you a link to verify.
signUp.descriptionInvite: Create an account to accept your invitation.
signUp.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to confirm your email and sign in. The link expires in 1 hour.
signUp.verifyDescriptionInvite: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to confirm your email and sign in. The link expires in 1 hour. Your invitation will be ready right after.
signUp.tryDifferentEmail: Didn't get it? Check spam, or <retry>try a different email</retry>.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.sentDescription: If an account exists for {{email}}, we just sent a link to reset the password. The link expires in 1 hour.

reset.invalidDescription: Reset links expire after one hour and can only be used once. Request a new one to continue.
reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.description: Pick something you haven't used before. At least 12 characters, and not one that has appeared in a known data breach.
reset.mismatch: Passwords do not match — they are case-sensitive, check capitalization.
reset.success: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.

magic.sentInbox: Magic link sent — check your inbox.

acceptInvite.signUpDescription: Set a name and password for {{email}}. We'll email a link to verify before you join.
acceptInvite.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to confirm your email — your invitation to {{orgName}} will be accepted automatically. The link expires in 1 hour.

notFound.title: Invitation not found
notFound.message: The link you used is invalid or has been revoked.

expired.title: Invitation expired
expired.message: Ask the person who invited you to send a fresh link.

alreadyAccepted.title: Already accepted
alreadyAccepted.message: This invitation has already been used.

errors.email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address
